atlas v0.5
Back To Families

Contemporary Web Family

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Thesis, evidence, navigation, and labels coexist. The page must remain trustworthy and scannable even when it gets dense.

Historical Roots

Bauhaus / Functional ModernismSwiss / International Typographic Style

Structure Fit

Archive StackCatalog Explorer

Interpretation

怎么借这条家族，而不是只模仿表面

Signature

  • dense but structured scanning
  • topic-led navigation
  • evidence modules
  • high information honesty

Borrow

  • clear thesis before detail
  • topic chips or side navigation
  • labeled evidence blocks

Best For

  • research hubs
  • design systems
  • guides
  • knowledge and decision surfaces

Avoid When

  • the content is thin
  • the page exists only to create mood
  • the task is emotionally led rather than evidential

Sample Gallery

真实网站样本

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

Historical Roots

它从哪些更早的语言长出来

1919-1933

Germany

Bauhaus / Functional Modernism

功能、工业和几何秩序优先。它把形式服从用途这件事系统化。

Descendant Families

Product Precision InterfaceEvidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
Open movement

1950s-1970s

Switzerland

Swiss / International Typographic Style

网格、对齐、无衬线、秩序感。它是今天大量知识型、设计型、档案型网页的基础语法之一。

Descendant Families

Swiss Typographic GridEvidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
Open movement

Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格 packet

Prompt DNA

Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface

Use an evidence-dense knowledge surface: thesis first, structured evidence blocks, explicit labels, and navigation strong enough to keep dense information readable.

Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节

  • Our World in Data
  • Atlassian Foundations
  • Carbon for AI

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.
